name: Party Quiches
recipeIngredient: 418 grams canned Alaska salmon (red or pink)
recipeInstructions:
This recipe makes four quiches with different fillings. If desired, one single filling may be chosen, but the ingredients must be multiplied by four.
1. Pre-heat oven to 200°C, 400°F, Gas mark 6.
2. Drain the cans of salmon.
3. Flake and set aside.
4. Divide the pastry into four and roll out to line four 22.5 cm / 9-inch flan dishes.
5. Spread the salmon evenly over the base of each flan.
6. Arrange the broccoli in one flan, the asparagus in another, and the leeks and tomatoes in the other two.
7. Sprinkle the spring onions over the asparagus quiche, onion over the broccoli, smoked salmon into the leeks, and olives into the tomato.
8. Top the broccoli quiche with Stilton, the asparagus with Cheddar, the leek quiche with Mozzarella, and the tomato with Feta cheese and pesto.
9. Beat the remaining ingredients and pour into each flan.
10. Bake for 10 minutes at 200°C, 400°F, Gas mark 6.
11. Reduce temperature to 160°C, 325°F, Gas mark 3 and cook for an additional 40 minutes.
12. Serve with salad.
Makes 4 servings. Approx. 255 calories per serving.
